svg.text:
┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ TRANSFER LEARNING CONCEPT │ └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
ImageNet Pretrained Model: ───────────────────────── • Trained on 1.2M images, 1000 classes • Learned generic visual features • Early layers: edges, textures (universal) • Later layers: object parts (more specific)
Your Task (e.g., 100 images, 5 classes): ───────────────────────────────────────── Option 1: Train from scratch ❌ → Overfit, poor generalization
Option 2: Transfer learning ✅ → Leverage pretrained knowledge → Works with limited data
Feature Hierarchy: ────────────────── Layer 1-2: ▓▓▓ Edges, colors → Universal (keep frozen) Layer 3-4: ▓▓▓ Textures, patterns → Semi-universal (maybe fine-tune) Layer 5+: ▓▓▓ Object parts → Task-specific (fine-tune) Classifier: ▓▓▓ Categories → Replace completely
